title: agrostis tenuis subsp. vulgaris
intro: Agrostis tenuis subsp. vulgaris, also known as common bent or red-top bentgrass, is a type of grass species commonly found in wet meadows, marshes, and along streams. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis tenuis subsp. vulgaris include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The leaves can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or dried for later use, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
